metadata.title: AI Historical Timeline — YTD 2026
metadata.description: Verified AI events for cross-referencing weekly dashboard content. Use to validate that events mentioned in articles actually occurred in the stated timeframe.

events.title: State AI Laws Take Effect
events.detail: California Transparency in Frontier AI Act (TFAIA) and Texas Responsible AI Governance Act (RAIGA) go into effect. 600+ AI bills introduced across state legislatures in 2026 sessions.

events.title: MIT Tech Review: 'What's Next for AI in 2026'
events.detail: Major prediction roundup. Themes: pragmatism over hype, agent deployment, regulation battle.

events.title: DeepSeek V4 / R2 Launch Timing Stays Hidden
events.detail: Reports confirm DeepSeek R2 remains unreleased due to Huawei Ascend chip training failures. No confirmed public launch date. Beta testing only.

events.title: AAAI-26 Conference
events.detail: Annual AAAI conference held Jan 20–27 at Singapore EXPO. Major papers on reasoning, multimodal AI, and agent architectures.

events.title: Meta CTO Bosworth Announces Superintelligence Labs Progress at Davos
events.detail: Meta CTO Andrew Bosworth at World Economic Forum confirms Meta Superintelligence Labs delivered first high-profile AI models internally.

events.title: AI Scientist v2 Open-Sourced by Sakana AI
events.detail: Sakana AI open-sources AI Scientist v2 (arXiv: 2504.08066). First AI system to author a peer-reviewed publication (ICLR 2025 workshop).

events.title: Anthropic Releases Claude Opus 4.6
events.detail: Major model upgrade. 1M token context window in beta. Significant improvements in reasoning and code generation.

events.title: OpenAI Releases GPT-5.3 Codex
events.detail: Specialized coding model release focused on software engineering tasks.

events.title: Anthropic Releases Claude Sonnet 4.6
events.detail: Fast, capable model with 1M token context beta. Positioned as daily-driver model.

events.title: xAI Releases Grok 4.20
events.detail: Features unique four-agent architecture. Released same day as Claude Sonnet 4.6.

events.title: Google Releases Gemini 3.1 Pro
events.detail: Dominates 13 of 16 major benchmarks at launch. 2M token context window, native multimodal.

events.title: February Model Release Velocity Record
events.detail: 12 significant model updates in a single month: Gemini 3.1 Pro, Claude Opus 4.6, Claude Sonnet 4.6, GPT-5.3 Codex, Grok 4.20, Qwen 3.5, Mercury 2, ByteDance Seed 2.0, MiniMax M2.5, GLM-5, LongCat-Flash-Lite.

events.title: xAI Releases Grok 4.20 Beta 2
events.detail: Iterative improvement on February Grok 4.20 release.

events.title: Mistral Releases Small 4
events.detail: Compact, efficient model from Mistral AI.

events.title: OpenAI Releases GPT-5.4 (Standard, Thinking, Pro)
events.detail: Three variants. GPT-5.4 Thinking scores 83.0% on GDPVal benchmark (at/above human expert level). Major reasoning upgrade.

events.title: NVIDIA GTC 2026 Opens
events.detail: March 10–14 at SAP Center, San Jose. Jensen Huang keynote March 16. Dominated by production deployment and enterprise agentic frameworks. Vera Rubin GPU unveiled. $1T purchase order projection through 2027.

events.title: Jensen Huang GTC Keynote: Vera Rubin, DLSS 5, Groq 3 LPU
events.detail: Unveiled Groq 3 LPU (from $20B acquisition), Vera Rubin rack-scale systems, DLSS 5. Announced Uber autonomous fleet in 28 cities. Disney Olaf robot demo.

events.title: OpenAI Releases GPT-5.4 Mini and Nano
events.detail: Smaller variants of GPT-5.4 for cost-efficient and edge deployment.

events.title: White House Releases National AI Policy Framework
events.detail: Legislative recommendations for Congress. Proposes broad federal preemption of state AI laws that impose 'undue burdens.' Follows Dec 2025 executive order.

events.title: OpenAI Shuts Down Sora
events.detail: Sora video generation tool discontinued. Inference cost ~$15M/day vs. $2.1M total lifetime revenue. Downloads fell 66% from Nov 2025 peak. Compute reallocated to world simulation for robotics. Disney $1B deal dead.

events.title: Anthropic MCP Crosses 97 Million Installs
events.detail: Model Context Protocol reaches critical mass. Every major AI provider now ships MCP-compatible tooling. Becoming the 'HTTP of AI tools.'

events.title: Noah Labs FDA Breakthrough Device Designation
events.detail: Voxan voice-based heart failure detection system receives FDA Breakthrough Device Designation. AI diagnostics expanding beyond imaging.

events.title: Zhipu AI Releases GLM-5.1 API
events.detail: Chinese AI lab releases API access to GLM-5.1 (744B MoE model).

events.title: California Governor Signs Executive Order N-5-26
events.detail: Newsom signs EO directing state agencies to develop AI vendor certification and procurement standards. State sets national template.

events.title: Q1 2026 AI Venture Funding: $242B–$300B
events.detail: Crunchbase reports $300B total Q1 funding, ~80% ($242B) to AI. More than double previous quarterly record. OpenAI raised $110B (largest private round ever, $840B valuation).

events.title: GPU Rental Prices Surge ~40%
events.detail: NVIDIA hardware rental prices surge approximately 40% driven by demand from AI training and inference workloads.

events.title: Crunchbase Q1 2026 Funding Report Published
events.detail: Formal publication of Q1 2026 venture funding data confirming record AI investment.

events.title: Google Releases Gemma 4
events.detail: Frontier-level open model under Apache 2.0 license. Advanced reasoning and agentic workflows. Free for commercial use.

events.title: Microsoft Announces $10B AI Investment in Japan
events.detail: AI infrastructure race goes global. Part of broader Microsoft AI expansion strategy.

events.title: Andrej Karpathy Publishes LLM Wiki
events.detail: Open-source tool: dump raw research into folder, LLM builds interlinked wiki autonomously. Karpathy's wiki grew to 100 articles, 400K words. Threatens Confluence/Notion market.

events.title: Meta Releases Llama 4 Maverick
events.detail: 400B parameter MoE model with 1M context window (10M reported in some sources). Largest context of any open model.

events.title: AI Energy Efficiency Breakthrough Published
events.detail: Researchers unveil approach that could slash AI energy use by up to 100x while improving accuracy. Published in ScienceDaily.

events.title: Anthropic Withholds Claude Mythos — Project Glasswing Announced
events.detail: First time a frontier lab voluntarily withholds a completed model due to cybersecurity risks. Limited-partner program (Project Glasswing) announced for vetted access.

events.title: Zhipu AI Releases GLM-5.1 Open-Source Weights (MIT License)
events.detail: 744B MoE model released under MIT license. Beats Claude Opus 4.6 and GPT-5.4 on SWE-Bench Pro. Open-source from China outperforms closed Western models on real-world coding.

events.title: Meta Launches Muse Spark
events.detail: First model from Meta Superintelligence Labs (formerly FAIR). Built to monetize across Meta's 3.9B user base. As capable as older Llama 4 midsize for 'order of magnitude less compute.'

events.title: Anthropic Revenue Run Rate Reported at $30B
events.detail: Up from $9B end of 2025 — 3.3x growth. (Note: some sources report ~$19B ARR; figures vary by source.)

events.title: Project Glasswing: 40+ Companies Given Mythos Preview Access
events.detail: Tech and cybersecurity companies receive tiered access to Claude Mythos under Project Glasswing.

events.title: NVIDIA 8-Day Winning Streak
events.detail: NVIDIA hits $188.53 on 8-day winning streak after soft March CPI report. Macro + AI double tailwind.

events.title: CoreWeave Momentum Surges on $6.8B Meta Contract
events.detail: CoreWeave momentum score surges 32 → 74 on $6.8B Meta infrastructure contract. Neocloud model validated at scale.

events.title: CFRA Upgrades META to Strong Buy
events.detail: AI monetization thesis gains analyst conviction. Piper Sandler: 'Mag 7 became the Lag 7' — rotation signal.

events.title: CoreWeave-Meta $21B Expanded AI Infrastructure Deal
events.detail: CoreWeave and Meta expanded their AI infrastructure agreement to $21B (on top of prior $14.2B), running through 2032. Total Meta contracts now $35B. Uses NVIDIA Vera Rubin systems.

events.title: Anthropic-Google-Broadcom 3.5GW TPU Compute Deal
events.detail: Anthropic signed deal for 3.5GW of Google TPU capacity via Broadcom, on top of 1GW already coming online. Mizuho estimates $21B Broadcom AI revenue from Anthropic in 2026, $42B in 2027. Anthropic has 1,000+ enterprise customers spending $1M+/year.

events.title: Anthropic Loses Appeals Court Bid on Pentagon Blacklisting
events.detail: Federal appeals court denied Anthropic's request to temporarily block DOD 'supply chain risk' designation. First American company to receive this classification. Oral arguments set for May 19.

events.title: CoreWeave-Anthropic $6.8B Multi-Year Agreement
events.detail: CoreWeave secured $6.8B deal with Anthropic to power Claude models using NVIDIA Vera Rubin GPUs. Stock surged 12%. Revenue backlog exceeds $66B. Two landmark deals in 48 hours.

events.title: GPT-5.5 Spud Pretraining Complete (Widely Reported)
events.detail: OpenAI's next frontier model completed pretraining ~Mar 24. Could ship as GPT-5.5 or GPT-6. Polymarket: 78% probability of release by Apr 30. Brockman: 'two years of research inside this model.'

events.title: 19 State AI Bills Passed Into Law
events.detail: 19 new AI laws passed in two weeks. NY RAISE Act (S 8828) requires frontier model developers ($500M+ revenue) to publish safety plans and report incidents within 72 hours. Effective Jan 1, 2027. Another 27 bills passed both chambers.

events.title: Eli Lilly LillyPod AI Supercomputer Goes Live
events.detail: Pharma's most powerful supercomputer: 1,016 NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs, 9,000+ petaflops. Simulates billions of molecular hypotheses. Goal: cut 10-year drug development timeline in half.

events.title: Eclipse Ventures $1.3B Physical AI Fund
events.detail: Largest fund raise in Eclipse's 11-year history. $720M early-stage + $591M growth. Focus: robotics, defense, manufacturing. Total AUM ~$10B.

events.title: Sora Web/App Discontinuation (Upcoming)
events.detail: Scheduled date for Sora web and app experiences to be fully discontinued. API continues until September 24.

not_yet_released.title: DeepSeek R2
not_yet_released.detail: Training delays on Huawei Ascend chips. Not a single successful training run achieved on Ascend hardware. Pivoted back to Nvidia. Beta testing only. No confirmed public launch date as of April 10, 2026.
not_yet_released.common_misreport: Often incorrectly reported as released or as a 2025 event. R1 was released Jan 2025; R2 remains unreleased.

not_yet_released.title: Llama 4 Behemoth
not_yet_released.detail: Announced but not yet released as of April 10, 2026.

not_yet_released.title: GPT-5.5 / GPT-6 (Spud)
not_yet_released.detail: Pretraining completed ~Mar 24, 2026. Currently in post-training (RLHF, safety tuning). Could ship as GPT-5.5 or GPT-6 depending on benchmark results. Polymarket: 78% probability of release by Apr 30. Greg Brockman: 'two years of research inside this model.'

not_yet_released.title: Colorado AI Act (SB 24-205)
not_yet_released.detail: Takes effect June 30, 2026. Requires reasonable care to protect consumers from algorithmic discrimination.

not_yet_released.title: Apple Reimagined Siri
not_yet_released.detail: Targeted for release alongside iOS 26.4, reportedly March 2026 window but may slip.
